title: orchis zahlensis
intro: Orchis zahlensis, also known as the Zahl's orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The roots of the Zahl's orchid have been traditionally used to create herbal preparations such as teas and infusions that offer several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the Zahl's orchid is also used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory effects.
